title: ProviderAssignmentState
description: Maps active workers to provider slots and records quota state for scheduling decisions. Written by the launcher after worker dispatch and read by the launch gate and monitoring. See docs/ai-native/provider-assignment-state-schema.md for field-level documentation.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version pinned to 1. Consumers must reject records with a different version.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this assignment snapshot was captured.

assignments.description: Active worker-to-provider assignments. Each entry represents one running worker assigned to a provider slot.

providers.description: Per-provider state including capacity, quota status, and assigned worker count.

global.description: Aggregate assignment and capacity summary across all providers.

taskId.description: Unique identifier for the worker task, matching the heartbeat taskId.

providerId.description: Provider the worker is assigned to, matching a provider id in provider-pool-policy.json.

assignedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the worker was assigned to this provider.

issueNumber.description: GitHub issue number this task targets, if applicable.

prNumber.description: GitHub pull request number produced by this task, if applicable.

taskType.description: Type of task from the task contract.

actorRole.description: Role that is performing the work, from the task contract rolePacket.

providerId.description: Provider identifier, matching a provider id in provider-pool-policy.json.

status.description: Current provider status. available = has capacity, exhausted = quota/rate limit hit, disabled = auth failure or manual disable.

assignedWorkerCount.description: Number of workers currently assigned to this provider.

maxConcurrency.description: Maximum concurrent workers allowed on this provider, from provider-pool-policy.json.

quotaState.description: Quota health signal. healthy = well within limits, approaching_limit = near capacity, exhausted = quota hit, unknown = no signal.

lastQuotaCheckAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last quota state check for this provider.

cooldownExpiresAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the exhaustion cooldown expires. Null when not in cooldown.

consecutiveFailures.description: Number of consecutive failures on this provider. Resets to 0 on successful assignment.

totalActiveAssignments.description: Total number of active worker assignments across all providers.

totalAvailableSlots.description: Total remaining capacity across available providers (sum of maxConcurrency minus assignedWorkerCount for available providers).

totalMaxConcurrency.description: Global maximum worker concurrency from provider-pool-policy.json.
